arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs. Liverpool: Should Arne Slot take Cody Gakpo risk in Champions League?
arts.sum: Liverpool have left several first-team players out of their squad for their Champions League clash against PSV Eindhoven, but starting Cody Gakpo could be a risk.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Ballon d'Or: Why Liverpool defender could be best centre-back of all time, ahead of John Terry, Rio Ferdinand
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk is making a claim to be labelled the best centre-back in the history of the Premier League, as well as the history of football.

arts.ttl: Champions League permuations as Liverpool, Arsenal, Man City and Aston Villa face decisive matches
arts.sum: The final fixtures of the group stage of the 2025 Champions League take place on Wednesday evening and with every side set to be in action throughout the evening, plenty could still happen

arts.ttl: Liverpool working to find new loan transfer solution in next few days
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly working to find a new loan club for young midfielder Stefan Bajcetic after a lack of playing time at Red Bull Salzburg this season. arts.ttl: “Current decision…” – Liverpool & Chelsea transfer target informs clubs of his choice
arts.sum: Despite links with Liverpool, Chelsea and Napoli, it seems Karim Adeyemi has informed interested clubs of his decision to stay with Borussia Dortmund. arts.ttl: How to watch PSV vs Liverpool: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains why he's breaking own Liverpool rule as transfer opportunity arises
arts.sum: Arne Slot doesn't usually look further ahead than the next match but the Liverpool head coach admits that's not the case this week

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes major Arne Slot point after Liverpool transfer statement
arts.sum: Liverpool have romped into the next round of the Champions League and top the Premier League table in Arne Slot's debut season, but there is consternation among a section of the club's support about a lack of spending
